frames: The agent stands upright, then begins to lean slightly to its right.
It continues to tilt further to the right, maintaining contact with the ground at its base.
The agent's body is now significantly angled, falling towards the right side.
The fall progresses, with the upper segment moving closer to the ground.
The agent's main body is nearly horizontal, with its base still partially upright.
The entire structure is now almost flat, with the base rotating to align with the body.
The agent is collapsing onto the ground, with its segments nearly parallel to the surface.
The agent has completely fallen and is lying flat on the checkered ground.
